case_title: DUC CHAN TRAN VS. LESLIE MARIE BUTLER

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,436.80 FILED BY TRAN, DUC CHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, LESLIE MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-25-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, LESLIE MARIE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, DUC CHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER, LESLIE MARIE $5,436.80 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,511.80, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, DUC CHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER, LESLIE MARIE
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, DUC CHAN
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS BY INSTALLMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTLER, LESLIE MARIE

ORDER ON (SC-222) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (INSTALLMENT) FILED BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENT OF $50.00 ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: DEC-01-2012 UNTIL THE FULL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT, PLUS INTEREST IS PAID. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
